mapper.select: SELECT item_id, equip_id, item_name, item_std, sort_order, apply_from_ym, del_from_ym, img_file FROM tb_inspect_item WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_inspect_item (equip_id, item_name, item_std, sort_order, apply_from_ym) VALUES (#{equipId}, #{itemName}, #{itemStd}, #{sortOrder}, #{applyFromYm})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_inspect_item SET img_file=#{imgFile} WHERE item_id=#{itemId}
UPDATE tb_inspect_item SET del_from_ym=#{delFromYm} WHERE item_id=#{itemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_inspect_header (equip_id, inspect_ym, inspector_name, confirmer_name, status) VALUES (#{equipId}, #{inspectYm}, #{inspectorName}, #{confirmerName}, #{status}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE inspector_name=VALUES(inspector_name), confirmer_name=VALUES(confirmer_name), status=VALUES(status), saved_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
INSERT INTO tb_inspect_result (equip_id, inspect_ym, inspect_day, item_id, result) VALUES (#{equipId}, #{inspectYm}, #{inspectDay}, #{itemId}, #{result}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE result=VALUES(result)
